active_pills.label: Career Paths
active_pills.intro: Posts on AI engineer vs ML engineer, role differences, salary by experience, transitions from adjacent roles, and what's actually hiring in 2026. Read these if you're choosing a track or comparing where you'd land.

active_pills.label: Roadmaps
active_pills.intro: What to learn, in what order, and what changed this quarter. Honest takes on staying current in a field that ships a paradigm every 18 months.

active_pills.label: Interview Prep
active_pills.intro: Real questions actually asked in 2026 AI engineering interviews — system design, coding, and the LLM-application questions that didn't exist two years ago.

active_pills.label: Salaries
active_pills.intro: Real compensation data by experience, region, and stack — not LinkedIn averages. Refreshed quarterly from primary sources (BLS, levels.fyi, public reports).

active_pills.label: Tutorials
active_pills.intro: Hands-on walkthroughs: how to actually build the thing, what to skip, what trips up everyone the first time. Code-first, not theory-first.

active_pills.label: Comparisons
active_pills.intro: Head-to-head breakdowns of frameworks, tools, models, and roles — with the tradeoffs the marketing pages skip.

active_pills.label: Build in public
active_pills.intro: Lessons from building AutomateEdge in the open — design principles, post-mortems, the things that didn't work.
